tenant.description: Workday tenant name, substituted as a path segment into every stream's resource URL (e.g. ccx/api/v1/<tenant>/workers).

username.description: Workday tenant API username, sent via HTTP Basic auth. Never logged.

password.description: Workday tenant API password, sent via HTTP Basic auth. Never logged.

base_url.description: Workday API base URL override for a tenant's actual Workday instance, tests, or proxies.
